extract: Dusty Bowl (Japanese: 砂塵の窪地 Sandstorm Pit) is a part of the Wild Area in the Galar region, located in the center of the northern portion of the Wild Area. It connects to the Stony Wilderness to its south, the Hammerlocke Hills to its northeast, and the Giant's Mirror to its east. If the player passes under the stone arch in Dusty Bowl with a Galarian Yamask that has taken at least 49 HP in damage from attacks without fainting, it will evolve into Runerigus.
